name: radialdeck-multitouch-gestures
description: RadialDeck — multitouch gesture overlay and radial keyboard launcher for Windows. Whole-screen touch gesture engine (edge swipes, 3-5 finger gestures, pinch, rotate, custom shapes) plus a floating radial/grid shortcut deck for touchscreens, drawing tablets, and pen displays.
_note: Installer is built by build/make-installer.js (a self-elevating C# bootstrapper that embeds dist/win-unpacked). electron-builder is NOT used: its winCodeSign step needs symlink privilege and the project lives on a cloud drive elevated processes can't see.
